'''Gellefon''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Korness system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. It was the location of [[Kig Dannen Spaceport]]. It was a planet of cool, rocky crags, mountains, and crevasses. It was inhabited by [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and other sapients as well as the indigenous, semi-[[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[gellbeast]]s known as wardogs. The planet was ruled by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Schennt]] from his domicile in the center of Kig Dannen. [[Pinnacle Keep]], an Imperial detention center, was also located on this planet.
